name: gsap
description: GSAP is a framework-agnostic JavaScript animation library that turns developers into animation superheroes. Build high-performance animations that work in **every** major browser. Animate CSS, SVG, canvas, React, Vue, WebGL, colors, strings, motion paths,
license: GreenSock's standard 'no charge' license can be viewed at http://greensock.com/standard-license. Club GreenSock members are granted additional rights. See http://greensock.com/licensing/ for details. Why doesn't GreenSock employ an MIT (or similar) open source license, and why is that a *good* thing? This article explains it all: http://greensock.com/why-license/
